sizing_rule.note: Straight half f strategy: Apply 1.4167 multiplier to optimal f$ values (System A: $6,000→$8,500; System B: $4,600→$6,518; System C: $7,200→$10,200) for multi-system position sizing adjustment

source_rule_text: Use the straight half f strategy to adjust position sizing based on optimal f values calculated for multiple market systems, scaling new f by 1.4167 multiplier.
